name: Intimidate
description: Lowers the opponent's Attack upon entering battle.

name: Levitate
description: Gives full immunity to Ground-type moves and Spikes.

name: Overgrow
description: Boosts Grass-type moves when HP is low.

name: Blaze
description: Boosts Fire-type moves when HP is low.

name: Torrent
description: Boosts Water-type moves when HP is low.

name: Sturdy
description: Prevents being OHKO'd when at full HP and negates one-hit KOs.

name: Pressure
description: Doubles PP usage of opponent's moves.

name: Moxie
description: Raises Attack after knocking out an opponent.

name: Protean
description: Changes the user's type to the move it uses.

name: Natural Cure
description: Heals status conditions upon switching out.

name: Magic Guard
description: Only damage taken from attacks (blocks status/entry hazards).
